_comment: Performance thresholds for mini-redis. Single CLI invocation on pre-populated store.
_scoring: Score = 100 if p95 <= target_p95. Score = 0 if p95 >= fail_p95. Linear interpolation between.

get_10k_keys.description: GET a key from a store containing 10,000 keys

lrange_10k_list.description: LRANGE 0 -1 on a list with 10,000 elements

hgetall_1k_fields.description: HGETALL on a hash with 1,000 fields
